name: Rum Raisin Cake (Corky)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel bananas and beat in a mixer until liquified.
2. Add sugar, eggs, oil, and rum to the banana mixture; beat until well combined.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, soda, salt, and allspice.
4. Beat the flour mixture into the banana mixture until blended.
5. Stir in raisins and walnuts.
6. Pour batter into a 10-inch greased or sprayed fluted tube pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before inverting it onto a wire rack to cool completely.
9. Dust with confectioner's sugar if desired.
